comment: Known AIWolf-contest leftover entities found in src/data/*_speeches.json. Shared by src/diagnostics/nameDetector.ts (vitest audit) and scripts/speech-corpus-name-audit.mjs (static corpus scan). Latin names are matched case-sensitively with word boundaries; katakana names with katakana boundaries. 'May' is intentionally excluded from the Latin list (too ambiguous with the English modal/month); its katakana form メイ is listed instead.
